subject: Can we get Slack alerts for new tickets?
reference_reply:
Hi Devon,

Great timing — Slack ticket alerts are in beta. I can enable it on your workspace today: Settings → Integrations → Slack, then pick a channel. If you'd rather use the API, here's the webhook docs: docs.example.com/slack. Want me to turn on beta access for your account?

— Riley
